title: Belt Buckle
description: While you have no potions, you have [blue]2[/blue] additional [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: The Dexterity bonus is applied when you enter combat or obtain the relic if you have no potions. It is immediately removed when you obtain a potion and reapplied when you use or discard a potion and have none remaining. The effect is cleared after combat ends.
